base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_screw_attack — a pickup_item from 1986 metroid. Screw Attack — upgrades spin-jump to damage enemies on contact. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Screw Attack — upgrades spin-jump to damage enemies on contact; found in Norfair
